description: Engine message dispatch (§51.0.S). A click calls @gate.advance(.Toggle); the (Closed x .Toggle) arm resolves .Open and the engine transitions. The auto-derived @gate (§51.0.C) + its interpolation read Open.
rationale: §51.0.S events ride .advance(.Msg) (there is no .send verb). The matching (state x message) arm resolves the target; Closed + .Toggle -> Open. Driven by a markup onclick, not a runtime reach-in.
